project_summary: Requirements draft from 7 utterances (Client, PM) with 3 functional requirements, 2 non-functional requirements, 0 constraints, and 6 open questions.

functional_requirements.text: We need a website for our cafe where customers can see the menu and opening hours.
Customers should be able to reserve tables online.
Yes, an admin page should let staff edit menu items and prices.

non_functional_requirements.text: The site must load fast on mobile because most customers use phones.
I want a clean and modern design, and maybe online payment later.

assumptions.text: I want a clean and modern design, and maybe online payment later.

open_questions.text: Should staff update menu items themselves?
Ambiguous quality target needs clarification: The site must load fast on mobile because most customers use phones.
Ambiguous quality target needs clarification: I want a clean and modern design, and maybe online payment later.
Do you already have a preferred payment provider?
